All Games · The Road to St. Cloud
Schedule
District 6 · Palma Ceia
1Tampa Bayshore 7, Palma Ceia 6 WMon · 6/15
2Tampa Bayshore 6, Keystone 5 WTue · 6/16
3Keystone 10, Palma Ceia 0Wed · 6/17
4Keystone 16, Tampa Bayshore 1Thu · 6/18
5Tampa Bayshore 7, Keystone 4 WFri · 6/19
State Tournament · St. Cloud · Field 7
G1Tampa Bayshore vs Section 2Sat 7/18 · 9:00 AM
G2Tampa Bayshore vs Section 1Sat 7/18 · 11a / 1p
★Championship vs Pool A winnerSun 7/19 · 10:00 AM
G2 time set by G1: win · 1:00 PM, lose · 11:00 AM. Pool B winner advances to the Championship.
Team Travel
State Weekend Itinerary
Friday · July 17
11:00 AMDepart from Carol Kennedy Field.
12:00 PMLunch at Golden Corral Buffet and Grill, Lakeland.
2:30 PMArrive at team hotel, Courtyard by Marriott Orlando Lake Nona.
2:30 PMPool time for the girls, until 4:00.
4:00 PMFamily check-in at hotel.
5:00 PMBus to the field.
5:30 PMWatch the 10U All-Stars game. Optional, but let's support them.
Post gameTeam dinner at Village Inn, sponsored by the Walker family. Thank you Walkers.
AfterBack to hotel.
Saturday · July 18
7:00 AMBreakfast in uniform.
7:30 AMBus to field.
9:00 AMGame 1 vs Section 2.
Sunday · July 19
7:30 AMLobby for breakfast, in uniform.
8:30 AMLeave hotel for the fields.
9:00 AMArrive at the fields.
10:00 AMState Title Game.

Parents able to leave at 11:00 AM are welcome to follow the van.
